generic_rules: Focus repairs on resolving unresolved identifiers reported by the validator.
Ensure expressions on both sides of binary operators have the same type.
Use only visible AADL features or explicitly declared helper variables in AGREE contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq` to define helper variables with explicit types.
Use `const` for named constants with explicit types.
Stateful equations require initialized temporal recurrence (e.g., `0.0 -> pre(t) + step`).
anti_patterns: Do not attempt to repair by adding AADL architecture; focus on AGREE expression correction.
Avoid modifying unrelated parts of the architecture during repair.
Do not introduce new identifiers without corresponding AADL declarations.
irrelevant_topics: Type scope range assumption and guarantee
